common.offlineSavedToast: Offline: saved locally and will sync when the connection is back.
common.loadErrorToast: Couldn't load the information. Check your connection.

login.subtitle: Smart cattle management
login.title: Sign in
login.errorInvalidCredentials: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
login.errorConnection: Could not connect to the server. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a 6-digit verification code.

verifyOtp.title: Enter the code
verifyOtp.description: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. It expires in {time}.
verifyOtp.expired: The code expired. Request a new one.
verifyOtp.resendError: Could not resend the code. Try again in a few minutes.

resetPassword.title: Create new password
resetPassword.description: The password must have at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number and one special character.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid or expired recovery link. Request a new one.
resetPassword.passwordInvalid: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number and one special character.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password was changed successfully. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.errorExpired: The link expired or was already used. Request a new one.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Could not update the password. Please try again.

configuracion.title: Settings
configuracion.changePasswordConfirmMessage: We'll send a verification code to {email}. Do you want to continue?
configuracion.errorSendOtp: Could not send the code. Please try again.

reportes.title: Reports & Statistics
reportes.loadError: Could not load the data. Check your connection.

historial.title: Weighing History
historial.loadError: Could not load the history. Check your connection.
historial.noRecordsSub: Weighings done with AI will appear here
historial.noRecordsInRange: No weighings in that date range

detalle.title: Cattle Management
detalle.updateErrorDefault: An error occurred while updating the health status.
detalle.offlinePhotoSavedToast: Offline: photo saved and weight will be estimated when the connection is back.
detalle.photoSaveErrorToast: Could not save the photo locally. Please try again.

animales.emptyNote: Tap the + button to add one.

fincas.deleteFarmMessage: Do you want to delete this farm?
fincas.deleteFarmHasAnimals: This farm can't be deleted because it has cattle associated with it.
fincas.deleteFarmErrorDefault: Couldn't delete the farm. Please try again.
fincas.saveFarmErrorDefault: Couldn't save the farm. Please try again.
fincas.pendingEstimationToast: Select the farm where the estimated animal will be registered.

ganadero.selectBreedMessage: For a better estimate, select the animal's breed before estimating.
